# PHASE 12.5 INDEX

## Product Localization, Branding & Release Packaging

**Status:** PENDING USER TEST

## Scope

- Persian localization audit
- Brand system with Moghareh Motors logo
- Asset registry
- Copyright policy
- Persian language guide
- Demo package plan (no real ZIP/installer)

## SQL

PHASE 12.5 has no database write foundation; localization, branding, asset registry and demo package planning are static/read-only.

| Page | Path |
|------|------|
| Localization Audit | `erp-localization-audit.php` |
| Brand System | `erp-brand-system.php` |
| Asset Registry | `erp-asset-registry.php` |
| Demo Package | `moghare360-demo-package.php` |
